channel.title: Silvier Linings
channel.description: Recent blog posts on Silvier Linings

item.title: Parenting Haikus, 4/27/26-5/3/26
item.description: In the dark of the night he thrashed his body around I left the room * I am working on shortening the pre-nap bounce my back needs a break * Like plant parenthood the line between too much and too little is thin * He was happy when we rubbed noses together or at least he smiled * In the blue sleep suit he sleeps much more soundly than the same one but white

item.title: Parenting Haikus, 4/20/26-4/26/26
item.description: A blissful four days With good strong long naps for him Me alive again * And then just of course Disruption, mayhem, madness Fifteen minute naps * He has been cleared of Telescoping intestines And hip dysplasia * Music class was fun! I might be the only one singing. Babies coo. * He got his two month shots One Band-Aid on each leg Screamed quite loud, then slept
